---
species: "Agarum clathratum"
accepted_code: "AGCL"
alternate_codes: 
diminutive: "AGCLJ" 
alternate_diminutives: "AGJ" 
common_name: "Shotgun kelp"
field_id_possible:
  - yes
description: "Kelp with many regular holes in the blade, juvenile <5cm" 
image: '/header_images/Agarum_clathratum_3_mandy_lindberg_seaweeds_alaska.jpg'
categories:
  - brown algae
  - kelp
sampling_programs:
    - keen_quad
    - keen_upc
    - bhi_quadrat
    - bhi_rov
    - lsw_quad
    - lsw_microquad
habitat:
  - intertidal
  - subtidal
mobility:
  - sessile
sampling_region:
  - GOM
  - Virginian
catami_code: 80300902
catami_version: "1.4"
worms_code: 157207
---

![](/header_images/Agarum_clathratum_3_mandy_lindberg_seaweeds_alaska.jpg)
<br>
[Photo from Seaweeds of Alaska by Mandy Lindberg](https://www.seaweedsofalaska.com/species.asp?SeaweedID=18)

**Other images:** <!-- Other images with attribution -->
<br/>

**Distinguishing features:** 
<!-- size, gross morphology, a key identifier, zonation notes (intertidal or depth) -->
<br/>

**Easily confused species and differentiation:** 

<br/>

**Extended Description:** <!-- Extended description -->

<!-- link to worms page -->
